input.subject: You're Invited! Emma's 6th Birthday Party!
input.body_text:
Hi there!

You're invited to celebrate Emma's 6th birthday!

When: Saturday, February 22nd, 2026
Time: 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM
Where: FunZone Play Center
        456 Rainbow Lane
        Pleasantville, CA 94123

Theme: Unicorns & Rainbows!

Please RSVP by February 15th to lisa.chen@gmail.com or text (555) 123-4567.

We hope to see you there!

Lisa & Emma

events.title: Emma's 6th Birthday Party
events.location: FunZone Play Center, 456 Rainbow Lane, Pleasantville, CA 94123
events.description: Unicorns & Rainbows theme birthday party for Emma
